basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 29 April 2026 on the official website of ACTREC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ACTREC Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: Please refer to the official notification for last date details.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. in Microbiology, B.Sc. in Biotechnology, B.Tech in Biotechnology, B.Sc. in Life Sciences
qualification.details: MANDATORY: B.Sc. in Microbiology / B.Sc. in Biotechnology / B.Tech in Biotechnology / B.Sc. in Life Sciences. DESIRABLE: CMLT/DMLT/ADMLT from a recognized university. DESIRABLE EXPERIENCE: Working knowledge of computer and data entry.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Research Assistant.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Research Assistant position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates do not need to apply online.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 23,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the mandatory qualifications required?
faq.answer: The mandatory qualifications are B.Sc. in Microbiology, B.Sc. in Biotechnology, B.Tech in Biotechnology, or B.Sc. in Life Sciences.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 25 May 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the venue for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The venue is Kharghar, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, 410210.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age limit mentioned?
faq.answer: Specific age limits are not detailed here; please refer to the official notification for precise age criteria and any relaxations.
